query: SELECT id, subject, status, recipientCount, openedCount, scheduledAt, sentAt, createdAt, send_date, TIMESTAMPDIFF(MINUTE, createdAt, sentAt) AS minuti_preparazione FROM newsletter_sends WHERE id = 1710001; SELECT send_date, recipientCount, status FROM newsletter_sends WHERE status IN ('sent','failed') ORDER BY send_date DESC LIMIT 14;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3aGZ9MSLrhgSbtV.0a4dfe1f8b2a --database UyPaon6i3Ec4nvfPz6kUfg --execute SELECT id, subject, status, recipientCount, openedCount, scheduledAt, sentAt, createdAt, send_date, TIMESTAMPDIFF(MINUTE, createdAt, sentAt) AS minuti_preparazione FROM newsletter_sends WHERE id = 1710001; SELECT send_date, recipientCount, status FROM newsletter_sends WHERE status IN ('sent','failed') ORDER BY send_date DESC LIMIT 14;
